async_tcp_client_create.tooltip: Create a new asynchronous TCP client object

async_tcp_client_connect.message0: TCP client %1 connects to host %2 port %3
async_tcp_client_connect.tooltip: Connect to the specified TCP server

async_tcp_client_connected.tooltip: Check if TCP client is connected

async_tcp_client_connecting.tooltip: Check if TCP client is connecting

async_tcp_client_space.tooltip: Get the size of TCP buffer available space

async_tcp_client_can_send.tooltip: Check if data can be sent (no data to be confirmed)

async_tcp_client_set_rx_timeout.message0: TCP client %1 Set receive timeout %2 seconds
async_tcp_client_set_rx_timeout.tooltip: Set the timeout for receiving data (seconds)

async_tcp_client_remote_ip.tooltip: Get the IP address of the remote host

async_tcp_client_remote_port.tooltip: Get the port number of the remote host

async_tcp_client_on_connect.message0: When the TCP client %1 connects successfully
async_tcp_client_on_connect.tooltip: Set callback processing when TCP connection is successful

async_tcp_client_on_disconnect.tooltip: Set callback processing when TCP connection is disconnected

async_tcp_client_on_data.tooltip: Set the callback processing when TCP receives data. The data and length will be stored in the specified variable.
async_tcp_client_on_data.message1: The data is stored in %1 and the length is stored in %2

async_tcp_client_on_error.message0: When an error occurs in TCP client %1
async_tcp_client_on_error.tooltip: Set callback processing when TCP errors occur
async_tcp_client_on_error.message1: The error code is stored in %1

async_tcp_client_on_ack.tooltip: Set the callback processing when TCP receives ACK confirmation
async_tcp_client_on_ack.message1: The confirmation length is stored in %1 and the time taken is stored in %2 (milliseconds)

async_tcp_client_on_timeout.tooltip: Set callback processing when TCP timeout

async_tcp_client_error_to_string.message0: TCP error code %1 converted to text
async_tcp_client_error_to_string.tooltip: Convert TCP error codes into readable error descriptions

async_tcp_server_create.tooltip: Create a new asynchronous TCP server

async_tcp_server_begin.tooltip: Start the TCP server and start listening for connections

async_tcp_server_set_no_delay.tooltip: Set the server's TCP no-delay mode

async_tcp_server_on_client.message0: When the TCP server %1 has a client connection
async_tcp_server_on_client.tooltip: Set callback processing when a new client connects
